postmark.Subject: Refinance — Sarah Chen (Montréal)
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Refi for Sarah Chen on propriété à 1855 Avenue Papineau, Montréal, QC H2K 4L7.

Valeur évaluée: $580,000
Hypothèque existante: Desjardins, solde $245,000
Montant du prêt demandé: $320,000
Ratio prêt-valeur: 55%

Dossier complet ci-joint. Borrower has communication preference in French; admin-facing comms can be in English.

Exit strategy: borrower intends to sell the property at end of term.

Jonathan Ferrara
Ferrara Financial
Lic. #M16002271
